jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Edge Network

location.name: Hybrid - San Francisco, New York City, Austin

jobs.content:
About Vercel:

Vercel gives developers the frameworks, workflows, and infrastructure to build a faster, more personalized web. Own the edge network forwarding plane across 100+ POPs so Next.js apps cold-start in <50 ms anywhere on Earth.

  • Rust / Go / kernel-bypass networking experience required

jobs.title: Developer Advocate, Next.js Frontend Cloud
jobs.content: Own Vercel's developer-relations motion across the Next.js community and the v0 AI-assisted-development surface — keynote talks, OSS reviews, and conference programming for the global frontend ecosystem.
